description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story apartment building with a dark, gabled roof and light-colored horizontal siding. The front facade features two covered wooden stairway entrances, symmetrically placed, and a row of evenly spaced windows on both floors. The rear side of the building has a long, continuous balcony running the length of the structure, supported by posts and accessible from multiple doors. The sides of the building show additional windows and small wooden balconies, adding to the residential character. The windows are large and regularly arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design is functional and typical of suburban or small urban apartment complexes, with a focus on accessibility and communal living.
description: A two-story, light-sided apartment building with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and prominent front and rear entrances. Features include covered stairways, long balconies, and multiple large windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing two floors of windows and a small wooden balcony on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a long, continuous balcony spanning the entire length of the building with multiple doors and windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large section of windows and another small wooden balcony.
description_view_3: Front view displaying two covered wooden stairway entrances and symmetrically arranged windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows on both floors, with consistent spacing and alignment across all facades.
